'''Korseg IV''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Grohl sector/Legends|Grohl sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] maintained a [[Flare Base|base]] there that was discovered and attacked by a [[Imperial Army/Legends|ground force]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In the ensuing [[Battle of Korseg IV|battle]], the Alliance emerged victorious.

==Description==
Korseg IV was a remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="2ERE" /> in the [[Korseg system/Legends|Korseg system]], a part of the [[Grohl sector/Legends|Grohl sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The planet's sub-[[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] climate zone included a lattice-work of [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]].<ref name="2ERE" />

==History==
{{Main|Battle of Korseg IV}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] maintained a base high in Korseg IV's mountains. The facility, known as [[Flare Base]], contained highly sensitive information in its [[Computer/Legends|computers]]. At one point, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discovered the location of the base and dispatched a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] to attack it.<ref name="2ERE" />

Arriving in the Korseg [[Star system/Legends|system]], the [[Medium cruiser|cruiser]] traveled directly to Korseg IV and was detected by Flare Base's [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. While the base raised its [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] and began evacuation, the Rebel [[Alliance Military/Legends|soldiers]] present at the facility prepared to engage the incoming [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial ground force]] in [[Battle of Korseg IV|battle]]. A [[Dropship/Legends|dropship]] dispatched from the Imperial [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] and carrying an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] as well as a [[Company/Legends|company]] of [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] landed five [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] north of the base. The Alliance forces attacked the Imperials and prevailed in the subsequent confrontation.<ref name="2ERE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Korseg IV was first mentioned in the [[1992]] [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition]]'', authored by [[Bill Smith]].<ref name="2E">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition]]</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Korseg system, and therefore Korseg IV, in grid square R-16.<ref name="TEA" />
